shapes.init_eqs_str: a['yrapidness'] = 0; a['nowdiff'] = 0; a['backdiff'] = 0; a['steadiff'] = 0; a['rapidness'] = 0; a['nowvol'] = 0; a['steadvol'] = 0;
shapes.frame_eqs_str: a['r']=Math.sin(a['time']); a['g']=Math.sin((a['time']*0.9)); a['b']=Math.sin((a['time']*1.1)); a['r2']=(1-a['r']); a['g2']=(1-a['g']); a['b2']=(1-a['b']); a['yrapidness']=0.05; a['nowdiff']=(a['treb']-a['bass']); a['backdiff']=a['nowdiff']; a['nowdiff']=((Math.abs(above(a['nowdiff'], 1))>0.00001)?(1):(a['nowdiff'])); a['nowdiff']=((Math.abs(below(a['nowdiff'], -1))>0.00001)?(-1):(a['nowdiff'])); a['steadiff']=((Math.abs(equal(a['steadiff'], a['nowdiff']))>0.00001)?(a['nowdiff']):(a['steadiff'])); a['steadiff']=((Math.abs(below(a['steadiff'], a['nowdiff']))>0.00001)?((a['steadiff']+(a['yrapidness']*(a['nowdiff']-a['steadiff'])))):(a['steadiff'])); a['steadiff']=((Math.abs(above(a['steadiff'], a['nowdiff']))>0.00001)?((a['steadiff']-(a['yrapidness']*(a['steadiff']-a['nowdiff'])))):(a['steadiff'])); a['y']=((Math.abs(equal(a['instance'], 1))>0.00001)?((0.25+(0.25*Math.abs(a['steadiff'])))):((0.75-(0.25*Math.abs(a['steadiff']))))); a['rapidness']=0.02; a['nowvol']=div(((a['bass']+a['mid'])+a['treb']),3); a['steadvol']=((Math.abs(equal(a['steadvol'], a['nowvol']))>0.00001)?(a['nowvol']):(a['steadvol'])); a['steadvol']=((Math.abs(below(a['steadvol'], a['nowvol']))>0.00001)?((a['steadvol']+(a['rapidness']*(a['nowvol']-a['steadvol'])))):(a['steadvol'])); a['steadvol']=((Math.abs(above(a['steadvol'], a['nowvol']))>0.00001)?((a['steadvol']-(a['rapidness']*(a['steadvol']-a['nowvol'])))):(a['steadvol'])); a['x']=(a['x']-(0.2*a['steadvol'])); a['x']=((Math.abs(equal(a['instance'], 1))>0.00001)?((a['x']-0.02)):(a['x'])); a['rad']=((Math.abs(above(Math.abs(a['backdiff']), 1))>0.00001)?(((Math.abs(a['backdiff'])*(a['steadvol']+0.2))*a['rad'])):(a['rad']));
